# MuleSoft Salesforce Commerce Cloud B2C Data Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.0) of Salesforce Commerce Cloud B2C Data Connector documentation.
> See [Salesforce Commerce Cloud B2C Data Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/commerce-cloud-b2c-data-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Salesforce Commerce Cloud B2C Data Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Salesforce Commerce Cloud B2C Data Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/commerce-cloud-b2c-data-connector/latest/commerce-cloud-b2c-data-connector-examples.md)
- [Salesforce Commerce Cloud B2C Data Connector Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/commerce-cloud-b2c-data-connector/latest/commerce-cloud-b2c-data-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Salesforce Commerce Cloud B2C Data Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/commerce-cloud-b2c-data-connector/latest/commerce-cloud-b2c-data-connector-studio.md)
- [Salesforce Commerce Cloud B2C Data Connector XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/commerce-cloud-b2c-data-connector/latest/commerce-cloud-b2c-data-connector-xml-maven.md)
